description_long: This is a white ceramic cup featuring a vibrant, full-wrap illustration of several iconic superheroes in dynamic, action-oriented poses. The artwork is rendered in a painterly, watercolor style, with splashes of red, blue, yellow, green, and black forming the figures and their costumes. The cup has a smoothly curved handle and a cylindrical body, with the superhero artwork covering nearly the entire exterior surface except for the handle area. The interior of the cup is plain white, and the rim is slightly rounded for comfortable drinking. The overall finish appears smooth and slightly glossy, typical of glazed ceramic kitchenware.
description: A white ceramic cup with a colorful, painterly superhero illustration wrapping around its exterior and a smooth, glossy finish.
description_view_0: This view shows the cup's handle on the right and features the green and red figures of superheroes in the center of the artwork.
description_view_1: This view is focused on the handle, with only partial superhero artwork visible on either side of the handle.
description_view_2: This view displays the front of the cup, showcasing several superheroes in vivid colors, including red, yellow, and blue costumes.
description_view_3: This view highlights the back of the cup, with a prominent shield and a leaping superhero in red and blue at the center.
